```idris
module Main
import Hedgehog
import MSet1
import Base
import Combinatorics

genNode : Gen MSet1
genNode = do
  n <- nat (linear 1 3)
  pure $ fromNat n

genPix : Gen Pix
genPix = do
  a <- genNode
  b <- genNode
  pure $ MkPix a b

genMaxel : Gen Maxel
genMaxel = do
  pixels <- list (linear 0 4) genPix
  pure $ MkMaxel pixels

prop_undirected_symmetric : Property
prop_undirected_symmetric = property $ do
  m <- forAll genMaxel
  -- M + M^T is always symmetric!
  let undirected = addMaxel m (transposeMaxel m)
  isSymmetric undirected === True

main : IO ()
main = do
  success <- checkGroup $ MkGroup "Graphs"
    [ ("prop_undirected_symmetric", prop_undirected_symmetric) ]
  if success then putStrLn "SUCCESS" else putStrLn "FAILURE"
```
